source_decisions.description: Domain-specific source ownership decisions and access pointers for this skill.

setup_decisions.description: Semantic setup answers owned by this skill. Global config stores pointers here, not duplicate answers.

internal_state.description: Operational state for this skill, such as last checks, suppression windows, scores, and pointers.

caches.description: Dated or named caches/result snapshots owned by this skill.

preferences.description: Life-OS-specific preferences for this skill domain.
